titleStmt.title: SII 15.642: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 642. (B.K. No. 91 of 1929-30.) HŪVINA-HIPPARAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone built into the proper left wall (outside) of the Hanumān temple.
This is dated the month of Śrāvaṇa śu. 4, Friday. These details are not enough to fix the date.

It records a gift of land to the Jaina deity, Tīrthadēva of Iṅgaḷēśvara, for feeding the Jaina monks and nuns on the occasion of the death anniversary of Remmarasa's father by Habu Viṭharasa, Remmarasa and Rēcharasa. The gift was received by Dēvachandra in the presence of the preceptor Dharmakīrti Bhaṭāraka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu Iṁgaḷēsvarada tīrtta
dēvage hūvina hippara
geya habu viṭharasa reṁma
rasa rēcarasaru śrāvaṇa su 4 sukra
vāradaṁdu Ā reṁmarasana taṁdeya taddinada
lli Ajjiyaru risiyargge Āhāradānakke
biṭṭa bedeya gōla ma 12 śrīmadhaṁmma
kīrttibhaṭārakara śrīpādamūḷadalli
dēvacaṁdradēvaru dhārāpūrvvaka
vāgi haḍadaru . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 15.642 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
